title: Mercury | 20 Metre Electrical Insulation Tape – Strong PVC Adhesive | Water-Resistant & Flame Retardant | BS Approved | Professional & DIY Use | Red
features: Premium Electrical Insulation Tape | High-quality PVC tape designed for professional electricians, DIY enthusiasts, and general repairs. Strong adhesive ensures secure insulation for electrical wiring and cable protection
Flame Retardant & Water-Resistant | Meets BS3924, BS3887, and IEC 60454 safety standards, offering enhanced fire resistance and protection from moisture for long-lasting reliability

Versatile Use for Any Project | Perfect for electrical installations, wire repairs, outdoor weatherproofing, and even crafting, labelling, and colour coding. Available in multiple colours to suit different applications
Durable & Easy to Apply | Flexible PVC material with a strong bond to various surfaces, ensuring it stays in place while offering easy tearability for convenience
Generous Roll Size | 20 metres in length and 19mm width, providing excellent coverage for multiple applications without frequent replacements
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | 20 Metre Electrical Insulation Tape – Strong PVC Adhesive | Red The ideal solution for professional electricians, builders, and DIYers seeking reliable performance. Crafted from high-quality PVC material, this tape ensures durability, flexibility, and a strong adhesive bond for secure insulation. Whether you're repairing cables, bundling wires, or adding colour coding to electrical installations, this insulation tape meets British Standards (BS3924, BS3887, IEC 60454), ensuring safety and longevity. With an easy-tear design, this tape provides effortless application without compromising on hold strength. Available in multiple colours, it’s perfect for organising wires, identifying circuits, and sealing seams. Simply select the right colour for your project needs. Mercury’s insulation tape is the top choice for professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike. PRODUCT FEATURES: Premium Electrical Insulation Tape | High-quality PVC tape designed for professional electricians, DIY enthusiasts and more Flame Retardant & Water-Resistant | Meets BS3924, BS3887, and IEC 60454 safety standards Versatile Use for Any Project | Perfect for electrical installations, wire repairs, outdoor weatherproofing, and even crafting Durable & Easy to Apply | Flexible PVC material with a strong bond Generous Roll Size | 20 metres in length and 19mm width, providing excellent coverage SPECIFICATION: Length: 20 metres Width: 19mm Material: PVC Flame Retardant: Yes Water-Resistant: Yes Approval Standards: BS3924, BS3887, IEC 60454 Colour: Red
